status.text: Invalid symbol in expression '%1%' at location '%2%'
status.description:
The expression contains a syntax error.
This is an internal error. contact ixia support and include the details from error text.

status.text: Unterminated string in expression '%1%' at location '%2%'
status.description:
The expression contains an unterminated string (Missing double quote).
This is an internal error. contact ixia support and include the details from error text.

status.text: Syntax error in expression '%1%' at location '%2%'
status.description: The expression contains a syntax error.

status.text: Syntax error in expression '%1%' at location '%2%'
status.description:
The expression contains a syntax error.
This is an internal error. contact ixia support and include the details from error text.

The expression contains a type error.
This is an internal error. contact ixia support and include the details from error text.

status.text: Failed to get a response from interface manager
status.description: Failed to get a response from Interface Manager on the port.
